buildConfig.build_command: curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash && export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun" && export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH" && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun --filter @roxabi-live/app build

notes: Pages builds the SPA; auth/api paths are proxied by Worker roxabi-live-app (wrangler.deploy.jsonc).
productionBranch=staging until staging is promoted to main (main lacks apps/* monorepo).
